caption_guidance: Hook under 20 words, authentic brand voice. Body: 2-4 short lines — story, thought, or behind-the-scenes. CTA: light engagement question. Minimal promo language.
visual_guidance: Default Path A atmospheric scene. Tie to brand visual keywords and palette. No product hard-sell, no price badges, usually no on-image text.
path_rules: Default Path A. Use Path C only if user explicitly requests overlay text. Do not use Path B without a product asset and product_promo intent.

composition.safe_zone: Atmospheric composition, rule of thirds, brand-consistent color mood.

prompt_snippets.path_a: Atmospheric instagram lifestyle scene matching brand mood, vertical 4:5, cinematic natural light, minimal clutter, no text, no words, no typography, no logo, no obvious advertisement.
prompt_snippets.path_b: Only if a reference object is provided: subtle lifestyle scene with focal subject, not a sales layout.
prompt_snippets.path_c: Rare for general posts; simple brand-colored background with one short quote-style label max.
